§6Electric Arc Furnace§f:
The §6Electric Arc Furnace §f(advancedrocketry:arcfurnace) is a §emultiblock processing machine §f that §bsmelts and alloys §f materials using §6high-power §f electrical arcs. It is the §6primary §f metal-processing machine in Advanced Rocketry.

§6Production Path (recipes/arcfurnace.json)§f:
Pattern "aga / ice / aba":
- §ba§f: §6Nether Brick §f(minecraft:netherbrick) — 4 (corners)
- §bg§f: §6User Interface §f(advancedrocketry:misc:0) — 1 (top middle)
- §bi§f: §6Item IO Circuit Board §f(advancedrocketry:ic:4) — 1 (middle left)
- §be§f: §6Control Circuit Board §f(advancedrocketry:ic:3) — 1 (middle right)
- §cc§f: §6HeatProof Brick §f(advancedrocketry:blastbrick) — 1 (centre)
- §bb§f: §6Copper Ingot §f(ingotCopper) — 2 (bottom middle left + right)
- Yields 1× Electric Arc Furnace

§6Function§f:
- §bSmelting §f: 2× faster than a §6vanilla Furnace §f for the same item
- §bAlloy production §f: combine §6ingots §f to produce §6alloys §f (e.g., §6steel §f, §6titanium alloy §f)
- §bPower §f: §b200 RF/t §f at idle, scales with throughput
- §bMultiblock §f: 3×3×3 hollow cube with §6Structure Towers §f on the corners; the §6Electric Arc Furnace §f block is in the centre
- §bInput/Output §f: §6Item IO Circuit Boards §f on §binner faces §f handle I/O

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Electric Arc Furnace is a component of, but it is referenced in 100 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bSteel production §f: combine §6Iron §f + §6Coal §f in the §6Arc Furnace §f for §6Steel Ingots §f
- §bTitanium alloy production §f: see §6Titanium Alloy Processing §f quest
- §bCarbon §f smelting

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: the §6Arc Furnace §f requires §bcontinuous §fpower — use a §6big RF generator §f
- §eTip§f: pair with §6Carbon Bricks §f for §6carbon §f processing recipes
- §cWarning§f: the §6Arc Furnace §f §6does not §f produce §6experience §f like a vanilla Furnace
- §cWarning§f: the §6multiblock §f must be §6complete §f before the §bcontrol circuit board §f can transmit power
